title: GraphQL API Backend with Next.js
description: Complete route for building a type-safe GraphQL API: Apollo Server 4 in Next.js App Router, Prisma database layer, Clerk authentication in resolver context, Zod input validation, error monitoring, CI, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Initialize a Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up Apollo Server 4 with Next.js App Router catch-all route handler, define schema and resolvers
Add Prisma ORM as the data layer — resolvers call Prisma client to fetch and mutate database records
Add Clerk authentication and inject session into Apollo context so resolvers can verify the current user
Validate mutation inputs with Zod before they reach the database layer
Add Sentry error monitoring to capture resolver errors and schema validation failures
Configure CI to run TypeScript checks and tests on every push
Deploy the GraphQL endpoint to Vercel — configure DATABASE_URL and Clerk secrets as environment variables
